doc.ocr.intro: Built-in PaddleOCR engine, supports mixed Chinese/English recognition. Returns ResOcr objects with text, x, y, w, h properties.
doc.findImage.intro: Based on OpenCV template matching. Template images should be placed in the project res/ directory.
doc.yolo.intro: Built-in NCNN inference engine, supports YOLOv8. Deploy model to device first, see YOLO Deployment at bottom.
doc.ui.intro: UiAutomator-based widget lookup. Node objects have text, cls, bounds, center_x, center_y properties.
doc.scale.intro: Use coordinate scaling for automatic adaptation across different resolutions. Base resolution is 1080x2400.
doc.templates.intro: Pre-packaged common operation combos, complete multi-step operations in one line. Great for beginners.
doc.touch.randomClick.desc: Click with random offset near coordinates, simulating human behavior
doc.touch.swipe.desc: Swipe from one point to another
doc.touch.swipeDir.desc: Quick directional swipe, auto-calculates screen center area
doc.touch.clickTarget.desc: Click center coordinates of widget/OCR result
doc.findImage.screenFindFirstX.desc: Find the first matching template image
doc.findImage.findClickMaxProb.desc: Find highest-confidence template image and click
doc.findColor.get.desc: Get color value at specified position
doc.yolo.findX.desc: Find all targets with specified label
